ksa_text: Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata harvesting, lineage visualization, search and discovery mechanisms, data classification, business glossary linkage, and impact analysis features.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of relevant laws, policies, procedures, or governance related to critical infrastructure.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-013 (Data Quality) scores 0.419 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Modeler: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Score 0.419 is below 0.43 threshold for edge-case inclusion in Data Modeler.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Score 0.419 insufficient for edge-case inclusion (min 0.43). Decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: edge_case) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Modeler.

decision_rationale: Edge-case scope with score 0.419 below minimum threshold. Overturned at Pass 3.
